commands.review_summary:
The PR adds parser-backed exec approval risk lines and highlights across agent registration, Gateway schema/payloads, forwarded approval messages, approval view models, Control UI rendering, tests, changelog, and an npm registry pin.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main and PR head gives a high-confidence reproduction path for the review findings: compare the current commandAnalysis payload/test with the PR request payload, then inspect the raw-offset, carrier-detection, and empty-line formatter paths.
commands.review_followup: Draft, merge-dirty, maintainer-labeled PR needs author or maintainer rebase plus review-finding fixes before validation, not a ClawSweeper replacement branch.
